title: pogostemon paludosus
intro: Pogostemon paludosus, also known as Patchouli, is a genus of flowering plants in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pogostemon paludosus include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting skin health, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, extracts, and teas, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its benefits.
